hero.headline: I make sure your software works — before your users find out it doesn't.
hero.subheadline: QA Consulting · Automation Setup · AI-Powered Testing · n8n Workflows

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Mexican QA engineer and developer based in Vancouver. Studied at Langara College. Building a career at the intersection of AI and quality engineering. 1+ year of professional QA experience, actively specializing in AI-First testing approaches.
about.philosophy: I find hidden details — not just in software, but in life. Every bug tells a story.

services.title: Services
services.card1Desc: I review your product's quality end-to-end: test coverage, edge cases, user flows, and risk areas. You get a clear report and an action plan.
services.card2Desc: I build your automated test suite from scratch using Playwright, integrate it with GitHub Actions, and set up pipelines so every deploy is safe.
services.card3Desc: I design testing strategies that leverage AI to find smarter bugs, faster. Ideal for teams that want to move fast without breaking things.
services.card4Desc: I automate your repetitive business processes using n8n — connecting your tools, reducing manual work, and saving your team hours every week.
services.footer: Whether you're a startup, a growing team, or a recruiter — I'm available for freelance projects and full-time hybrid roles in Vancouver.

projects.title: Projects
projects.troudDesc: Hazard & mobility reporting app. Users report street problems (potholes, closures, construction) on a live map, then generate routes that avoid those hazards. Built with TomTom Maps API.
projects.learnezDesc: Inclusive learning platform for children with visual impairments, ADHD, and reading difficulties. Diagnostic onboarding routes children to specialized educators based on their needs.
projects.facepointsDesc: Android loyalty app supporting local businesses. Customers earn and redeem points via QR code scanning.
projects.truenorthDesc: React/TypeScript web application. Mark as "In Development".
projects.tarotDesc: Built using Gemini CLI as an agentic development experiment. Personal project.
projects.eduAppDesc: Platform for international students to find and enroll in Canadian school programs. Includes province-specific tax logic.

philosophy.title: QA Philosophy
philosophy.card1: Test like a user, think like an attacker
philosophy.card2: Automation amplifies quality — it doesn't replace thinking
philosophy.card3: The best bug report tells a story
philosophy.callout: Currently building QA pipelines with Playwright + GitHub Actions CI/CD

passions.title: Passions
passions.gamesDesc: I play to find what others miss
passions.automationDesc: If I do it twice, I automate it
passions.detailsDesc: Easter eggs aren't just in games
